title: helianthus angustifolius subsp. ciliaris
intro: Helianthus angustifolius subsp. ciliaris, also known as narrow-leaved annual sunflower or slender sunflower, is a plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and fever, as well as to treat wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Helianthus angustifolius subsp. ciliaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
